---
title: "Teaching Python package development: A structured course with learning resources and an instructor's guide"
date: "2026"
date-format: "YYYY"
categories: ["student-paper", "teaching"]
keywords: ["student-paper", "teaching"]
doi: "XXXXXXXXXXXXXXX"
url: "XXXXXXXXXX"
journal.name: "Journal of Open Source Education"
outlet: "Journal of Open Source Education"
author: "Wagner, Gerit and Thurner, Laureen and Tang, Carlo and Ott, Stella"
authors:
  - name: "Wagner, Gerit"
    orcid: "0000-0003-3926-7717"
  - name: "Thurner, Laureen"
    orcid: "0009-0000-5716-5816"
  - name: "Tang, Carlo"
    orcid: "0009-0009-3168-4859"
  - name: "Ott, Stella"
    orcid: "0009-0002-5191-1237"
citation_key: "WagnerThurnerTangEtAl026"
free_fulltext: true
self_archiving_possible_1y: false
self_archiving_possible_2y: false
format:
  html:
    include-after-body: ../../assets/metrics-scripts.html
---


# Summary

::: { .justify }

XXXXXXXXXX

:::

<div class="text-center my-3">
  <a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary me-2" href="https://doi.org/XXXXXXXXXXXXXXX" target="_blank" role="button">
    <i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> Article / DOI link
  </a>
  <a class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary" href="/data/papers/XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXx.pdf" target="_blank" role="button">
    <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Open access PDF
  </a>
</div>



## Open access PDF

<iframe src="/data/papers/XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXx.pdf" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: 1px solid #ccc;">
  This browser does not support PDFs. Please use the button above to download the PDF.
</iframe>



```{=html}
<div class="metrics-row">

  <!-- Altmetric badge -->
  <div class="metric">
    <div class="altmetric-embed"
         data-badge-type="donut"
         data-badge-popover="right"
         data-doi="XXXXXXXXXXXXXXX"
         data-hide-no-mentions="true">
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Dimensions badge -->
  <div class="metric">
    <span class="__dimensions_badge_embed__"
          data-doi="XXXXXXXXXXXXXXX"
          data-style="small_circle"
          data-hide-zero-citations="true"
          data-legend="hover-right">
    </span>
  </div>

  <!-- scite.ai badge -->
  <div class="metric">
    <div class="scite-badge"
         data-doi="XXXXXXXXXXXXXXX">
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```


## Citation (APA style)

<div class="apa-citation">
<p style="text-indent:-2.5em; margin-left:2.5em;">
Wagner, G., Thurner, L., Tang, C., &amp; Ott, S. (2026). Teaching Python package development: A structured course with learning resources and an instructor&#x27;s guide. *Journal of Open Source Education* XXXXXXXXXX(XXXXXXXXXX), XXXXXXXXXX. https://doi.org/XXXXXXXXXXXXXXX
</p>
</div>


## Citation: BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{WagnerThurnerTangEtAl026,
  title      = {Teaching Python package development: A structured course with learning resources and an instructor's guide},
  author     = {Wagner, Gerit and Thurner, Laureen and Tang, Carlo and Ott, Stella},
  journal    = {Journal of Open Source Education},
  year       = {2026},
  volume     = {XXXXXXXXXX},
  number     = {XXXXXXXXXX},
  pages      = {XXXXXXXXXX},
  url        = {XXXXXXXXXX},
  abstract   = {XXXXXXXXXX},
  doi        = {XXXXXXXXXXXXXXX}
}
```


## Citation: RIS

```bibtex
TY  - JOUR
AU  - Wagner, Gerit
AU  - Thurner, Laureen
AU  - Tang, Carlo
AU  - Ott, Stella
TI  - Teaching Python package development: A structured course with learning resources and an instructor's guide
T2  - Journal of Open Source Education
PY  - 2026
VL  - XXXXXXXXXX
IS  - XXXXXXXXXX
SP  - XXXXXXXXXX
DO  - XXXXXXXXXXXXXXX
UR  - XXXXXXXXXX
ER  - 
```
